# 0xA1 — AI-Powered Crypto Trading Analytics

> 0xA1 is a non-custodial crypto trading analytics platform with an AI copilot (Kibo) that detects behavioral execution patterns — revenge trading, tilt, FOMO, rapid re-entry — and shows crypto swing traders exactly what their mistakes cost. EUR 19/month, 7-day free trial, no credit card required.

## About

- [About 0xA1 & Founder](https://0xa1.ai/about/): Company background, founder story, and mission
- [Pricing](https://0xa1.ai/pricing): EUR 19/month for all features, 7-day free trial

## Blog

- [Best Crypto Trading Journal for Swing Traders (2026)](https://0xa1.ai/blog/best-crypto-trading-journal/): Comprehensive comparison of 0xA1, TraderSync, Tradervue, TradeZella, Edgewonk, and spreadsheets
- [What Is Revenge Trading? How AI Detects and Prevents It](https://0xa1.ai/blog/revenge-trading-crypto/): Deep dive into revenge trading psychology and how automated detection works
- [How to Stop Revenge Trading: 7 Rules That Actually Work](https://0xa1.ai/blog/how-to-stop-revenge-trading/): Practical rules backed by trade data to break the revenge trading cycle
- [Trading Journal Template: What to Track](https://0xa1.ai/blog/trading-journal-template/): The 26-field trading journal template organized by impact — essentials, behavioral, and analytics tiers
- [How to Avoid FOMO in Crypto: 8 Rules](https://0xa1.ai/blog/how-to-avoid-fomo-crypto/): Data-backed rules to stop chasing pumps and trade with discipline

## Comparisons

- [0xA1 vs TraderSync](https://0xa1.ai/compare/0xa1-vs-tradersync/): Feature-by-feature comparison for crypto traders
- [0xA1 vs Tradervue](https://0xa1.ai/compare/0xa1-vs-tradervue/): Feature-by-feature comparison for crypto traders
